items.title: How did this novel about food win a Booker Prize this year?
items.dek: Taiwan Travelogue is the first novel translated from Mandarin Chinese to win the prestigious award.
items.body: Taiwan Travelogue is the first novel translated from Mandarin Chinese to win the prestigious award.

items.title: US and Iran reach tentative deal to extend ceasefire, US officials say
items.dek: But there has been conflicting information from Tehran, with one news agency reporting that no deal has been finalised or confirmed.
